Your box atm is fairly barren and most characters are either not meeting their necessary breakpoints, missing core members for their ideal team or a mixture of both. To clear Story, you'll likely want to consider rolling for Xu and run her together with other Characters who has either Poison / Strength Down / high Constitution. You could ideally use a mixture of Caro / Aequor Characters for minimum investment. Can run Myriam (who is currently on the Triple Rerun Banner), Aigis (who you will receive upon clearing Chapter 1 of Arc 1), Faint / Leigh / Agrippa (who you can obtain from the Caro Standard Banner) and Faros / Caecus (who you can obtain from the Aequor Standard Banner)
He ideally wants Thais & Pickman whose Banners has already recently passed, but you can probably get away with running Leigh, Faint & Aigis up until Chapter 8 (or 9) of Arc 1 at the highest

You unfortunately cannot get Pickman in the same way though
As he released in Arc 2
And was thus not added to Standard Character Banners
(Characters who released in Arc 1 can be obtained through the Standard Banner)
Just keep in mind that it's an 0.03% chance

how often do characters rerun?
Characters generally have their Rerun 6 - 9 months after their last Banner launched / came out
Unless there are special circumstances
yikes thats pretty long. would i be better off trying to start a fresh team with relevant teammates ast ehyc ome by now?
Such as with the 2nd Anniversary where all Characters (who has released during Arc 2) had Rotating Banners for 30+ Days with the exception of GMurphy who had her own Single Target Banner active

Or when the Character has a relevant Event active (or is a major Part of somebody else's Story has a Banner active). For example, Daffodil & Thais was part of the Triple Rerun Banners while their own Event was active and Castor had a Rerun early since his Brother (Pollux) had a a Banner + Event active at the time
Yeah, I'd recommend it
Rerolling is also optional for you at this time, as you haven't gotten very far just yet
But I wouldn't recommend doing so after you pass Chapter 4 of Arc 1
As it becomes less worth the hassle
Due to the game's nature of showing you with plenty of Rewards earlier on

its good so yeh

Life Drain - Gain (200%) Keyflare at the End of Turn based on the maximum Keyflare (stat) of the Wielder. If Caro Realm is active, generate 1% Embryo Fusion for every 5 Keyflare Regen

Burial Grounds - Grants 25% Death Resistance at the Start of Exploration. Grants 50 Aliemus to the Wielder after triggering Death Resistance.
so burial is more of a general one

Which caro units are good to get from selectors?

Jenkins - pure dmg + crit buffer

Nautila - defensive unit with easier early clears due to base numbers

Helot - Very big Strike dmg buffer
